boundary_examples.text: Full `qgd_Circuit` parity is not part of the Phase 2 guarantee.
Broader standalone `NoisyCircuit` capability does not automatically imply guaranteed VQE-facing support.
Whole-register depolarizing remains optional rather than required.

required_boundary_examples: Full `qgd_Circuit` parity is not part of the Phase 2 guarantee.
Broader standalone `NoisyCircuit` capability does not automatically imply guaranteed VQE-facing support.
Whole-register depolarizing remains optional rather than required.

entry_point_phrases: The guaranteed Phase 2 VQE-facing density path is generated `HEA` only.
support_surface_inventory.label: Generated HEA only
primary_source_phrases: The current guaranteed density path is generated `HEA` only.

primary_source_phrases: The guaranteed mandatory gate surface remains `U3` and `CNOT`
